'''Voktunma''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Voktunma system/Legends|Voktunma system]] of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]].

==History==
An [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] aligned [[Planet/Legends|planet]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], Voktunma was controlled by [[Imperial Advisor/Legends|Imperial Advisor]] [[Bregius Golthan]]. The planet boasted a busy Imperial class [[Spaceport/Legends|starport]]. Its terrain was varied with a number of [[Mountain/Legends|mountain]] ranges, dense [[Forest/Legends|forests]], and cultivated plains. Of the native fauna, a [[Lizard/Legends|lizard]]-like [[Bird/Legends|avian]] nested in the mountainous regions.

Nestled in mountainous foothills to the west of the starport, Golthan kept his [[Golthan's Fortress|personal fortress]]. The fortress consisted of large towers and spires, and was guarded by a defense grid composed of a number of [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] towers placed strategically in the surrounding forests. Golthan also guarded the planet with three [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] in orbit, and numerous other military support craft.

In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], he imprisoned the [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] within his fortress. A member of the [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] group the [[Black Curs]], Golthan had caught her in a trap on [[Canyon]], designed to capture [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]. Satisfied with his catch, nonetheless, Golthan starved and interrogated her. The Black Curs launched a rescue mission on the ground and successfully infiltrated the fortress. They rescued Okeefe, and significantly damaged the fortress, before escaping in the ''[[Luudrian Star]]''.
